bugs-analyzer.description: Analyze the last N bugfix commits for root cause clusters and hot spots

ticket-validator.description: Grade ticket or PRD quality against project specs

optimize-knowledge.description: Clean up obsolete/conflicting knowledge and update the INDEX.md

index.description: Generate a file index manifest for a directory or scope
index.template:
Scan the given scope and produce a checklist index of all analyzable source files. Save the index to docs/specs/indexes/.

$ARGUMENTS

audit.description: Full business logic audit: staleness check, then extract all unprocessed or stale specs
audit.template:
Run the SPEC_MAINTENANCE_PIPELINE: Phase 0 (STALENESS_CHECK), Phase 1 (AUDIT), then Phase 3 (EXTRACTION) for all unprocessed or stale files. Skip Phase 2 (INDEXING) unless no index exists for the requested scope.

$ARGUMENTS

full-audit.description: Index all source files, then extract complete business logic specs
full-audit.template:
Run the complete SPEC_MAINTENANCE_PIPELINE: Phase 0 (STALENESS_CHECK), Phase 1 (AUDIT), Phase 2 (INDEXING), Phase 3 (EXTRACTION), Phase 4 (VALIDATION), Phase 5 (CODIFY), and Phase 6 (ARCHITECTURE).

$ARGUMENTS

staleness.description: Check which existing specs are out of date without triggering extraction
staleness.template:
Run Phase 0 (STALENESS_CHECK) only: for each existing spec in docs/specs/, read its Commit field, run git log to check if the source file has changed, and produce a staleness report table showing which specs are current vs stale and by how many commits.

$ARGUMENTS

spec-validate.description: Run quality gates against existing specs and report pass/fail per gate
spec-validate.template:
Run Phase 4 (VALIDATION) only against existing specs in docs/specs/. Check all four gates: structural completeness (7 sections), coverage of exported symbols, cross-reference link resolution, and commit freshness. Output a validation report table. Do not re-extract anything.

$ARGUMENTS

architecture.description: Generate or refresh ARCHITECTURE.md from all current specs
architecture.template:
Run Phase 6 (ARCHITECTURE) only: read all specs in docs/specs/, extract their dependency and cross-reference sections, and generate/update docs/specs/ARCHITECTURE.md with a Mermaid component diagram, module responsibilities table, hot spots, and data flow overview. Also update the ARCHITECTURE.md link in docs/specs/INDEX.md.

$ARGUMENTS

multi-plan.description: Standalone multi-perspective planner: bootstraps its own router+explorer session, then runs four parallel lens agents (Correctness, Risk, Architecture, Simplicity) synthesized into one conflict-aware blueprint

orch.template:
index_project and index_code; Using your @router, start the orchestration for:
$ARGUMENTS

context-audit.description: Evaluate and rewrite an AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md to be lean, high-signal, and actually effective
